payload.title: Header redesign: single-line, no-scroll toolbar
payload.description:
Replace the current wrapping/shrinking topbar with a single-line toolbar that holds at any reasonable width without growing taller or scrolling horizontally. Reduce the number of visible controls — collapse related controls behind menus and popovers — rather than compacting what's there.

## Goals
- Header stays exactly one row at all widths down to ~520px.
- No mid-word truncation on selects (e.g. "Group by ep").
- One primary CTA (+ New ticket), one + glyph total on the bar.
- Clear visual hierarchy: identity → scope → view controls → status → overflow → primary.

## Target shape
◆ Scope › Scope CLI ▾    [≡ View ▾]               ● ⋯  [＋ New ticket]

## Out of scope
- Command palette (⌘K)
- Mobile-first redesign
